summary: Iteration 107: Film Release Results View - VERIFIED. All 18 backend tests passed. The 'Risultati del Rilascio' section is correctly implemented in FilmDetail.jsx and displays film tier, key stats (quality, opening revenue, IMDb, total revenue), quality modifiers (advanced_factors), and critic reviews. The section is visible to all authenticated users, not just the film owner.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified via Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: Film Release Results View feature fully verified. The 'Risultati del Rilascio' section in FilmDetail.jsx (lines 864-1038) displays: 1) Film tier badge with tier score, 2) Key stats grid (quality, opening revenue, IMDb, total revenue), 3) Quality modifiers (advanced_factors) with color coding (green=positive, red=negative), 4) Critic reviews with ratings. The section is visible to all authenticated users. Test film ID: cefe9884-9c6a-4bf2-a61d-9df50c582786 (Test Release Completo).

film_tier_badge.displays: Tier name (NORMAL), tier score (56), crown icon

quality_modifiers.color_coding: Positive values in green (text-emerald-400), negative in red (text-red-400)

critic_reviews.color_coding: Based on rating (>=7 green, <=4 red, else amber)

release_event_detail.note: Not present for test film (release_event is null - created through old system). Section only shows when film has release_event from new pipeline.

backend_api.public_visibility: All fields visible to any authenticated user

notes: All features for the Film Release Results View are correctly implemented. The 'Risultati del Rilascio' section shows when a film has film_tier, advanced_factors, or release_event. The test film was created through the old system so release_event is null, but the section still renders correctly showing tier, stats, modifiers, and critics. The release_event_detail sub-section (data-testid='release-event-detail') only appears for films released through the new pipeline system. All Italian labels are correctly displayed.
